name: Marc Soler
summary: Highly experienced Senior DevOps Engineer with over 8 years of expertise in automating, deploying, and managing scalable cloud infrastructure. Proven ability to streamline CI/CD pipelines, enhance system reliability, and foster collaboration between development and operations teams. Seeking to leverage advanced skills in cloud technologies and infrastructure as code to drive efficiency and innovation.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Lead the design and implementation of CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI, reducing deployment times by 40%. Manage and scale Kubernetes clusters on AWS (EKS) and GCP (GKE), ensuring high availability and performance. Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and Ansible for automated provisioning and configuration management. Monitor system health and performance using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack, proactively addressing issues.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained CI/CD pipelines for various applications, improving deployment frequency. Managed cloud infrastructure on AWS, including EC2, S3, and RDS. Implemented containerization solutions using Docker and orchestrated them with Docker Swarm. Collaborated with development teams to troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure-related issues.

experience.title: Junior System Administrator
experience.description: Provided support for server administration, network maintenance, and user management. Assisted in the deployment and configuration of new hardware and software. Gained foundational knowledge in scripting and automation for routine tasks.
